title: lobivia marsoneri var. muhriae
intro: Lobivia marsoneri var. muhriae, also known as the Muhriae Lobivia or Desert Pincushion, is a type of cactus belonging to the Echinocereus subgenus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lobivia marsoneri var. muhriae include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and protecting against infections due to its high content of saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
